programme.title: Traps & Ambushes
programme.desc: A trap is a hidden danger, while an ambush is an attack by people caught off guard.

programme.title: The Leopard Rocks
programme.desc: In an obscure area of Rajasthan, leopards exhibit remarkable behavior. Mother Neelam safeguards her three cubs from adult male leopards in the vicinity.

programme.title: Texas Gator Savers
programme.desc: The team sets out on a paddle boat rescue, dives into chest-deep water to catch a sneaky gator, and treats another with an eye problem, blending adventure with care for wildlife.

programme.title: Texas Gator Savers
programme.desc: Two army veterans join Gary in a park rescue, while Arlie and Blue bravely wrangle a feisty gator from danger, blending teamwork, courage, and skill in handling wildlife challenges.

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: Pride Rules is a wildlife documentary that explores the dynamics and survival strategies of lions in their natural habitat.

programme.title: A Wolf's Journey
programme.desc: A Wolf's Journey follows the life of a lone wolf navigating survival, territory, and social interactions, revealing the challenges of wild living.

programme.title: Great Parks Of Africa
programme.desc: An exploration into the natural sanctuaries that provide haven for Africa's wildlife heritage.
